ham.subject: Out of Office: Priya Sharma
ham.body:
Hi everyone,

I will be out of the office from 2nd May to 6th May, returning on 7th May. During this period, I will have limited access to email.

For any urgent matters, please reach out to my colleague Rahul Mehta at rmehta@example.com or call +91-9876543210.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Priya

spam.subject: Urgent: Schedule Your Teams Meeting Today
spam.body:
Hello,

We have scheduled an important Teams meeting to discuss the Q3 project deliverables. Please join the meeting at <URL> at 10:00 AM tomorrow.

This meeting is mandatory for all stakeholders. If you cannot attend, kindly let us know by replying to this email.

Thank you and looking forward to your participation.

Best,
Project Coordinator
